tweet_text: Jose Mourinho shares a heartfelt tribute to Silvino Louro, his longtime goalkeeping coach who passed away. The duo achieved great success together at Porto, Chelsea, Inter Milan, Real Madrid, and Man Utd. 🖤⚽ #RIP #FootballFamily
article_title: Jose Mourinho posts heartbreaking tribute after death of ex-Chelsea and Man Utd coach
